name: claude-skills
description: Ryan Krol's personal Claude Code plugins and skills.

plugins.name: implementation-harness
plugins.description: Scaffold a Ralph-style single-loop, CI-gated TASKS.json implementation harness into any project, author its backlog, and operate it — via skills. Data-driven difficulty auto-tuning (faceted escalation calibration), a portable dashboard (backlog, rendered ideas inbox, and per-facet harness internals), an ideas-to-tasks pipeline, operational skills for pre-run vetting, interrupt recovery, and reviewing failed tasks into follow-ups, and an upgrade skill that reconciles an existing install with newer plugin versions. Distinct from the official ralph-loop plugin.
